name: Garden Vegetable Soup with Beef
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Textured Vegetable Protein, Beef Flavored (TVP®)
4 Beef Bouillon Cubes (or 1/4 cup Bouillon Granules)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large pot, except for the grated Parmesan cheese, which is bagged separately.
2. Add 7 cups cold water to the pot and bring it to boiling over medium heat.
3. Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10-20 minutes or until the vegetables and meat are tender.
4. If the soup is too thick, add more water as needed.
5. Serve hot, topped with grated Parmesan cheese on each serving.
Makes approximately 8-9 cups.
